name: Toward Inclusive Avatar Design with Limb Differences Through Artificial Intelligence
summary: arXiv:2607.11512v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: As extended reality becomes more popular for social interaction and entertainment, 3D avatars must represent the full diversity of body types. Most...
description: arXiv:2607.11512v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: As extended reality becomes more popular for social interaction and entertainment, 3D avatars must represent the full diversity of body types. Most 3D avatar systems only support normative bodies and do not accurately depict people with limb differences, amputations, or other morphological variations. This paper reviews emerging technical approa...
author: Fernanda Miyuki Yamada, Jo\~ao Paulo Gois, Hiroki Takahashi
